Transcript: There will be an old hog district, 11 members meeting tomorrow, January 14th at 2:00 PM. It will be at the KC hall, nine five six zero Walker road McGregor at the meeting. The directors will recommend ratification of a proposed contract with Windsor Raceway. Again tomorrow, January 14, 2:00 PM.
